arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt's Hugo Ekitiké: "I love scoring goals"
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt's Hugo Ekitiké has said the realisation that "the real pleasure comes from scoring" has turned him into one of the Bundesliga's biggest threats in front of goal this season. I liked being part of play, but I have also understood that real pleasure comes from scoring goals."

arts.ttl: Hugo Ekitiké feels "better prepared" for next step than in the past
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt forward Hugo Ekitiké says he feels "better prepared" for a move to a top club now than he did when he moved to Paris Saint-Germain at a young age.
